name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: World's largest health insurance scheme fully financed by the government.

name: ESIC (Employees' State Insurance)
description: Social security and health insurance scheme for Indian workers.

name: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Jan Arogya Yojana
description: Maharashtra state government flagship health insurance scheme.

name: Dr. YSR Aarogyasri
description: Andhra Pradesh state health scheme for below poverty line families.

name: Aarogyasri (Telangana)
description: Telangana state health insurance scheme covering major procedures.

name: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Insurance Scheme (Tamil Nadu)
description: Tamil Nadu government scheme providing free medical care to low-income families.

name: Mukhyamantri Amrutum (MA) Yojana
description: Gujarat health scheme for BPL and lower-middle-class families.

name: Bhamashah Swasthya Bima Yojana
description: Rajasthan state health insurance scheme for families below poverty line.

name: Karunya Health Scheme (Kerala)
description: Kerala scheme for financially backward patients with serious illness.

name: West Bengal Health Scheme
description: Provides cashless hospitalization to West Bengal state government employees.

name: Arogya Karnataka Scheme
description: Karnataka state's comprehensive health coverage scheme.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Antyodaya Upchar Yojana (MP)
description: Madhya Pradesh scheme for free treatment at government hospitals.
